findings.description: GPU0 peaks at 457W while GPU1 stays at 149W idle
GPU1 peaks at 455W while GPU0 stays at 197W post-load
Both GPUs loaded — GPU0 draws 26W more than GPU1
GPU1 draws 5W more than GPU0 at baseline

conclusion: B200 multi GPU divergence confirmed. GPU0 draws 26W more under dual load. GPU1 5W higher at baseline.
